title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 04 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 04 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.06% today, the main contract closed at 881.5.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are less active to purchase. The overall trading senƟment of the market is negative. PBF at Shandong port deal 888-898 yuan/mt, decrease 4-14 yuan/ mt；SSF at Shandong port deal 765 yuan/mt .PBF at Tangshan port deal 900 yuan/mt, decrease 15-18yuan/mt.
